channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.2
item.description:
### Bug Fix

- **Streaming responses no longer lose words at the end of sentences.** Adopted the "stream-then-replace" pattern from [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw): streaming deltas are ephemeral previews, replaced with authoritative content from gateway history when the run finishes. This eliminates truncation caused by the gateway's 150ms delta throttle dropping final tokens.

### Internal

- Net simplification (−31 lines) — removed fragile delta-patching logic in favor of a single `chat.history` reload on completion.
